tool_name: DCOIR Airtable WBS09 Add Missing Sort Row
trigger_conditions: Use for WBS09 Airtable grid views whose Sort panel opens in field-picker state and whose governed manifest expects one missing sort row. Do not use for filters, existing sort direction changes, or broad view repair.
safety_preconditions: DryRun first. Apply requires explicit token APPLY_WBS09_ADD_MISSING_SORT_ROW_BATCH. Do not click Copy from a view. Verify with panel readback after Apply.
input_contract: Manifest path plus explicit TargetListFile. Default target list: manifests/wbs09_add_missing_sort_row_targets.v1.json.
output_contract: Downloads folder output with per-target JSON, screenshots when enabled, rollup JSON, and ChatGPT-friendly evidence ZIP from the runner.
notes: Draft until dry-run and one-target smoke Apply validate field-picker selection, direction control handling, and after-reload readback.
validation_notes: v2 panel-bounds fix: right-side Airtable sort panel, avoid Copy from a view, DryRun first.
v2.1: sort-only verification gate; filter readback is out of scope for add-missing-sort-row Apply success. Smoke target must still be verified by independent v4 panel readback before batch Apply.
